---
title: "Project 1 Checkpoint 3"
author: "Mira Griffin, Eloise Melendez, Chloe Schurter"
format: html
---

```{r}
#| label: packages-setup
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| 

library(httr)
library(tidyjson)
library(jsonlite)
library(tidyverse)
library(glue)

cases_month <- readr::read_csv('https://raw.githubusercontent.com/rfordatascience/tidytuesday/main/data/2025/2025-06-24/cases_month.csv')
cases_year <- readr::read_csv('https://raw.githubusercontent.com/rfordatascience/tidytuesday/main/data/2025/2025-06-24/cases_year.csv')
```

```{r}
#| eval: false

base_url <- "https://api.api-ninjas.com/v1/country"

my_key <- "Y1uFEyHRSSkY4CU7PAkQfmHI8VsM3mvv75xLtbM4"

country = "USA"

USA_url <- glue("{base_url}?name={country};X-Api-Key={my_key}")

USA <- fromJSON(USA_url)

USA_urban <- USA |>
  select(urban_population) |>
  mutate(iso3 = country)

```

Function for getting urban population for a country:
```{r}
get_urban_pop <- function(country) {
  base_url <- "https://api.api-ninjas.com/v1/country"
  my_key <- "Y1uFEyHRSSkY4CU7PAkQfmHI8VsM3mvv75xLtbM4"
  my_url <- glue("{base_url}?name={country};X-Api-Key={my_key}")
  country_data <- fromJSON(my_url)
  
  country_urban_pop <- country_data |>
  select(urban_population) |>
  mutate(iso3 = country)
  
  return(country_urban_pop)
}

get_urban_pop("GBR")

```


Applying Function to all countries in data frame:
```{r}
unique_countries <- cases_year |>
  select(iso3) |>
  distinct() |>
  pull()

urban_pops <- map(unique_countries, get_urban_pop)
```

Combining data frames:
```{r}
urban_df <- bind_rows(urban_pops)


cases_year_urban_pop <- left_join(cases_year, urban_df, by = "iso3")
```
